snippet.title: How I made it big in Australia, the opportunities, and why anyone can make it big there | LNN
snippet.description:
Today we get to hear from a Kenyan who has lived in Australia for 25 years. A father, husband, personal development coach and conversationalist.

On this episode, he will walk us through his journey in Australia, the opportunities around, do’s and dont’s, and why parents should not be scared of sending their children to study in Australia 

#LynnNgugiNetwork #LynnNgugiShow #LNN

snippet.title: Phil Karanja on being told he would amount to nothing, fighting self doubt to be coming a star | LNN
snippet.description:
This executive interview with Kenya filmaker, Phil Karanja will make you believe everything is possible. 

On this episode , he walks is through younger days constantly being called a failure. Unlike his other four sisters who would bring home straigh A’s, the best Phil could do was a C

So did this kid from dandora end up dominating the kenya drama sector?

Looking back. What legacy does he want to leave behind ?

I really hope this episode inspires you

Dedicated toKasweeti, may the doors to your purposes open

#LynnNgugiShow #LynnNgugiShow






Join the Lynn Ngugi Club to access special content and supporter perks 🥰
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCa2gldA2ivhzMwIJRA5683w/join

snippet.title: I stayed in an abusive marriage for years, could not find the strength to walk out but I finally did
snippet.description:
When Carol got into her first marriage, she ignored all the red flags from the word go. She knew she had no business being with that man but the fear of, “what will people say” was so strong that she opted to remain in that marriage for years.,

However, after years of suffering, she left that marriage, started doing inner work, attended therapy and got to know herself more.

Then one day, love presented itself again, but this time she was ready, aware and healed. She said a big yes, and the rest is history 

#LynnNgugiShow #LynnNgugiNetwork #LNN

Join the Lynn Ngugi Club to access special content and supporter perks 🥰
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCa2gldA2ivhzMwIJRA5683w/join

snippet.description:
When Jael took an early retirement from her job at 36, she was clear about one thing, the village would be her new home. So she packed everything , left the city and settled in Kabondo, a beautiful village in Nyanza.

snippet.title: ‘When I die, I don’t want Friends to be the first thing that’s mentioned:’ Matthew Perry #shorts
snippet.description:
Ottawa-raised actor Matthew Perry, known as Chandler Bing on Friends, was found dead in his hot tub over the weekend. He was 54. An investigation into how he died is ongoing, and it may take weeks before his cause of death is determined.

In a CBC Q interview from November 2022, Perry talked about his memoir, Friends, Lovers, and the Big Terrible Thing, which details his long journey with addiction, fame and recovery.  

He told Q host Tom Power why he didn’t want to be remembered only for Friends, but his work to help people with addiction. 

Read more: http://www.cbc.ca/news

»»» Subscribe to CBC News to watch more videos: http://bit.ly/1RreYWS

snippet.description:
Jake's real-life wife, Joanna Newsom, makes an appearance!

» Subscribe for More: https://www.youtube.com/c/NBCBrooklyn99?sub_confirmation=1
» Stream All Episodes of Brooklyn Nine-Nine. Only on Peacock: https://pck.tv/3u6iDEy

BROOKLYN NINE-NINE ON SOCIAL:
Like Brooklyn Nine-Nine on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BrooklynNineNine

Follow Brooklyn Nine-Nine on Twitter: https://twitter.com/NBCBrooklyn99
Follow Brooklyn Nine-Nine on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcbrooklyn99

Find Brooklyn Nine-Nine trailers, full episode highlights, previews, promos, clips, and digital exclusives here. 

NBC ON SOCIAL:
YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/nbc
Twitter: http://Twitter.com/NBC
Facebook: http://Facebook.com/NBC
Instagram: http://instagram.com/nbc

ABOUT BROOKLYN NINE-NINE
"Brooklyn Nine-Nine" follows the exploits of hilarious Det. Jake Peralta (Andy Samberg) and his stoically ever-professional captain, Raymond Holt (Andre Braugher), along with their diverse, lovable colleagues as they police the NYPD's 99th Precinct. In this final season of the series, Jake and the squad must try to balance their personal lives and their professional lives over the course of a very difficult year.

Rounding out the ensemble is Sgt. Amy Santiago (Melissa Fumera), who has a passion for organization and a weakness for dork dancing; Lt. Terry Jeffords (Terry Crews), a mountain of a man whose most powerful muscle is his sweetheart; Jake's best friend and human puppy dog, Det. Charles Boyle (Joe Lo Truglio); and the incredibly secretive, tough-as-nails Rosa Diaz (Stephanie Beatriz). Also part of the Nine-Nine are veteran officers Det. Scully (Joel McKinnon Miller) and Det. Hitchcock (Dirk Blocker), whose only skill as police officers is their ability to make a passable pot of coffee.

Created by Emmy Award-winning writer/producers Dan Goor and Michael Schur, "Brooklyn Nine-Nine" won the 2014 Golden Globe Awards for Best Television Series - Comedy or Musical and Best Performance by an Actor in a Television Series - Comedy or Musical (Samberg). Emmy winner Braugher earned four Emmy nominations for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Comedy Series for his role as Capt. Holt.

Brooklyn Nine-Nine
https://www.youtube.com/NBCBrooklyn99

#brooklynninenine

ABOUT TALENT RECAP!
Talent Recap is the place where your love for TV talent competitions meets your addiction to viral videos! We're like a genie in a bottle, but instead of granting wishes, we bring you the most OMG-worthy moments from America's Got Talent, Britain's Got Talent, American Idol, and X Factor.

We know you live for the drama, the talent, and the occasional hilarious mishaps that happen backstage. And we've got your back! With judges like Simon Cowell, Sofia Vergara, and Heidi Klum, we're here to showcase the cream of the crop and introduce you to the stars of tomorrow.

We've got talent, we've got humor, and we've got your daily fix of OMG moments! Hit that subscribe button and join our tribe of talent enthusiasts. Trust us; you won't want to miss a single upload.

snippet.title: Joe Lynn Turner on Blackmore, Rainbow & Deep Purple!!
snippet.description:
#80smusic #guardiansofthegalaxyvolume3    #joelynnturner 

DEEP RAINBOW! Guest: Joe Lynn Turner on Blackmore, Rainbow & Deep Purple | Artists On Record

In a career that spans nearly 40 years and includes over 60 album credits, Joe Lynn Turner remains one of rock and roll's most distinctive, soulful and expressive vocalists.

From founding and releasing 4 albums with Fandango in 1977, to performing and recording with Rainbow, Yngwie Malmsteen's Rising Force, Deep Purple, Glenn Hughes, Mick Jones, Cher, Lita Ford, Billy Joel, Michael Schenker, and Arjen Lucassen's Star One - Five decades into his career, Joe Lynn Turner releases the heaviest music he has ever recorded on Belly Of The Beast.

      ➜ https://www.joelynnturner.com/
      ➜   @joelynnturnerofficial  
      ➜    https://lnk.to/JoeLynnTurner

snippet.title: 20 Disturbing Interviews with Serial Killers Before Execution
snippet.description:
These serial killer interviews are guaranteed to creep you out! For this list, we’ll be analyzing the most bizarre and harrowing discussions with famous killers before they died or were supposed to be put to death. Our countdown of disturbing interviews with serial killers includes Michael Bruce Ross, Ted Bundy, Richard Ramirez, Andrei Chikatilo, and more! Which of these unnerved you the most? Let us know in the comments below. 

Watch more serial killer videos here:
